title: PME Pink Number 1 Candle, Large Size
features: Finish off any celebration cake perfectly with this pink number candle
Pink candle with multi-coloured polka pots.
The candle is positioned on a wooden stick making it easy to place onto any cake and also environmentally friendly
description: From the manufacturer About us: PME (Precision Machining Engineers) was founded in London in 1956 and over the years has supplied a variety of technical solutions for a range of industries - medical, dential, automotive and even cigar cutters. PME quickly recognized a gap in the market for high-quality, mature and original products for cake decorating and quickly set out to establish itself as a pioneer in this field by producing a range of both original and innovative product lines. We now have nearly 2,500 non-food and food ranges in our range - from core products to consumables, from party to season, from sugar paste to sprinkles. PME has launched a whole range of products in recent years that can be used by beginners easily, easily and with lots of fun! Our experienced PME expert team together has almost 200 years of experience in cake decorating. Design Innovation. Technique. Quality Key words that PME has been living and breathing for years, and thanks to a whole new generation of customers.
